Compare characters from both strings. If they match, they contribute to the LCS. If not, you have two choices.
Define dp[i][j] as the LCS length of text1[0..i-1] and text2[0..j-1]. If text1[i-1] == text2[j-1], then dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j-1] + 1.
If the characters don't match, dp[i][j] = max(dp[i-1][j], dp[i][j-1]) — skip one character from either string.
Build the table bottom-up. The answer is dp[m][n] where m and n are the lengths of the two strings.
